description.ko: 보이지 않는 오디오 주파수를 빛과 액체 금속의 물리적 구조로 변환하여 복잡한 공명을 시각화했습니다.
description.en: A visual manifestation of complex frequencies, turning invisible audio into a physical structure of light and liquid metal.

prompt: A cinematic 3D sound visualization of ECHO-0, titled 'The Resonant Lattice.' A central vibrating liquid-chrome core suspended in a dark obsidian void. The vibration generates concentric #4169E1 royal blue ripples that solidify into sharp #32CD32 green geometric spikes at peak amplitude. Swirling #FFD700 gold light filaments wrap around the waves like violin strings, while an underlying #FF4500 electric orange pulse illuminates the atmospheric fog. Hyper-detailed ray tracing, fluid motion blur on the vibrating edges, and complex cymatic patterns. 8k resolution, visualizing the physical architecture of sound.
